evals.prompt: Audit Core Web Vitals for the production application. LCP is 5.2s, INP is 480ms, CLS is 0.24
evals.expected_output: Root cause diagnosis for each metric with specific code changes and expected improvements

assertions.text: Output identifies LCP element type (image, text, etc.)
Output checks for loading=lazy on LCP image as cause
Output recommends fetchpriority=high for LCP image
Output addresses INP via long task identification
Output mentions scheduler.yield() or Web Workers for INP
Output identifies CLS source (images, dynamic content, fonts)
Output mentions width/height attributes for image CLS
Output provides metric-specific thresholds (Good/Needs/Poor)
Output prioritizes fixes by impact (LCP first, then CLS, then INP)
Output distinguishes lab data (Lighthouse) from field data (CrUX)

evals.prompt: The main JavaScript bundle is 1.4 MB. Analyze and implement code splitting
evals.expected_output: Bundle analysis findings, code splitting implementation with React.lazy, and performance budget

assertions.text: Output recommends running bundle analyzer tool first
Output identifies specific oversized chunks or dependencies
Output implements React.lazy() with dynamic import
Output wraps lazy components with Suspense and fallback
Output identifies heavy libraries (moment, lodash) as targets
Output provides lighter alternatives for heavy libraries
Output mentions tree-shaking and named exports requirement
Output defines a performance budget for CI enforcement
Output provides verification method (re-run analyzer)

evals.prompt: Set up service worker caching for an e-commerce app. Static assets, API data, and product images
evals.expected_output: Workbox-based caching strategy with appropriate strategy per resource type and cache expiration

assertions.text: Output uses Workbox library
Output applies Cache-first for static assets
Output applies Network-first for API responses
Output applies Stale-while-revalidate for images
Output sets cache expiration with ExpirationPlugin
Output uses cache: Cache-first only for versioned (hashed) URLs
Output mentions service worker registration only in production
Output mentions HTTPS requirement for service workers

evals.prompt: INP is 650ms on a page with a search filter that re-renders 2000 items. Diagnose and fix.
evals.expected_output: Long task diagnosis with virtualization implementation and scheduler.yield() optimization

assertions.text: Output recommends profiling with Chrome DevTools Performance panel first
Output identifies the long task causing INP (> 50ms)
Output recommends virtualizing the list of 2000 items
Output mentions @tanstack/react-virtual or similar library
Output mentions breaking up synchronous work with scheduler.yield()
Output mentions React startTransition for non-urgent updates
Output provides INP target (≤ 200ms for Good)
Output provides re-measurement method after fix

evals.prompt: Set up performance budget CI enforcement to prevent regressions on every PR
evals.expected_output: Performance budget configuration with Lighthouse CI GitHub Actions workflow

assertions.text: Output measures baseline before setting budget
Output provides performance-budget.json or equivalent config
Output includes CWV thresholds in budget (LCP, INP, CLS)
Output includes bundle size thresholds
Output provides GitHub Actions workflow YAML or equivalent
Output mentions PR comment with before/after comparison
Output mentions blocking merge on budget failure
Output uses realistic thresholds (not all metrics at 'Good' threshold immediately)
